title: The Worden Standard Employee Handbook
description: Comprehensive digital and printable employee handbook detailing company policies, payroll, and code of conduct.
intro: This document outlines the expectations, rights, and regulatory obligations of every employee. It is designed to be dynamically updated with Supreme Court and 51-state legal precedents, and can be printed in full for physical distribution.

sections.heading: Code of Conduct & The Worden Standard
sections.body: We operate transparently, safely, and relentlessly. This section covers attendance, zero-tolerance drug policies, and our commitment to EEOC anti-discrimination laws. Every employee represents the Worden brand to the public.

sections.heading: Payroll, Prevailing Wage & Overtime
sections.body: Detailed explanations of how overtime is calculated, the mandatory use of the time-tracking app, and adherence to FLSA and Davis-Bacon prevailing wage requirements for government/municipal contracts.

sections.heading: Safety Violations & Disciplinary Action
sections.body: Safety is absolute. Outlines the progressive disciplinary steps for failing to utilize PPE, skipping pre-trip ELD inspections, or violating 811 Miss Utility guidelines. Gross negligence results in immediate termination.
